name: Raisin Peanut Clusters
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate in the top part of a double boiler over simmering water.
2. Add milk and salt, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens, about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in raisins and peanuts.
4. Drop tablespoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
5. Refrigerate until firm. Makes about 20 clusters.
Great for the sweet tooth
